description_long: This is a military-style olive green convertible car with a boxy, utilitarian design reminiscent of World War II-era vehicles. The car features a flat windshield, exposed spare tire mounted on the hood, and minimalistic bodywork with visible panel lines and rivets. The interior is open and spartan, with two rows of seating and no visible roof or side windows. The wheels are relatively thin with whitewall tires, and the rear of the vehicle displays a license plate and simple tail lights. The overall construction suggests a lightweight, functional vehicle designed for rugged use, likely for personnel transport or reconnaissance.
description: A vintage olive green military convertible car with a spare tire on the hood, open cabin, and utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat windshield, spare tire mounted on the hood, and symmetrical headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open cabin, two doors, and visible panel lines along the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the license plate, flat rear panel, and simple tail lights.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the open interior and utilitarian bodywork.
